children.heading: Labor attaché
children.label: 1 Labor attaché
children.text: The term “labor attaché” means an individual hired under part B.

children.heading: Labor obligations
children.label: 2 Labor obligations
children.text: The term “labor obligations” means the obligations under chapter 23 of the USMCA (relating to labor).

children.heading: Mexico’s labor reform
children.label: 3 Mexico’s labor reform
children.text: The term “Mexico’s labor reform” means the legislation on labor reform enacted by Mexico on .May 1, 2019
